testcase.name: GymsPage Component > When in loading state > should render the loading state via ContentRenderer
GymsPage Component > When data is successfully loaded > should pass correct props to header, list, and pagination
GymsPage Component > When an error occurs > should render the error state via ContentRenderer
GymsPage Component > User Interactions > should call updateFilters when the county filter is changed
GymsPage Component > User Interactions > should call handlePageChange when pagination is used
GymCard Component > Positive Scenarios > should render all sections with correct content for a full gym object
GymCard Component > Negative Scenarios > should render correctly with minimal gym data and hide optional sections
GymCard Component > Edge Cases > should disable the website link if the website URL is missing
GymCard Component > Edge Cases > should correctly display a non-active status like "Pending Approval"
GymCard Component > Edge Cases > should render without an affiliation section if affiliation data is missing
GymDetails > renders links and metadata for full gym details
GymDetails > hides optional sections when data is missing
GymFooter Component > When Website is Unavailable > should render a disabled button when websiteUrl is 'undefined'
GymFooter Component > When Website is Unavailable > should render a disabled button when websiteUrl is 'an empty string'
GymFooter Component > When Website is Unavailable > should render a disabled button when websiteUrl is 'only whitespace'
GymFooter Component > When Website is Available > should render an active link with all correct attributes
GymFooter Component > Edge Cases > should use a fallback in the aria-label if gymName is empty
GymHeader Component > Display Logic > should render the name, county, and status correctly
GymHeader Component > Image Rendering > should render the image with correct alt text and src when imageUrl is provided
GymHeader Component > Image Rendering > should not render an image if imageUrl is not provided
GymHeader Component > Edge Cases > should handle an empty name gracefully with a fallback
GymsList Component > Data Display > should render the correct number of GymCard components
GymsList Component > Data Display > should pass the correct data down to each GymCard
GymOfferedClasses Component > Rendering Logic > should render nothing if the classes array is undefined
GymOfferedClasses Component > Rendering Logic > should render nothing if the classes array is empty
GymOfferedClasses Component > Content and Accessibility > should render the correct labels for a given list of classes
GymOfferedClasses Component > Content and Accessibility > should not render a label for a class that is not provided
GymsPageHeader Component > Title Rendering > should render the default title when no countyName is provided
GymsPageHeader Component > Title Rendering > should render the default title if countyName is "all"
GymsPageHeader Component > Title Rendering > should render the default title if countyName is "All" (case-insensitive)
GymsPageHeader Component > Title Rendering > should render a county-specific title when a countyName is provided
GymsPageHeader Component > Total Count Display > should not render the total count element if totalGyms is undefined
GymsPageHeader Component > Total Count Display > should not render the total count element if totalGyms is 0
GymsPageHeader Component > Total Count Display > should render the correct singular text for a single gym
GymsPageHeader Component > Total Count Display > should render the correct plural text for multiple gyms
GymsPageHeader Component > Data Attributes > should apply a custom data-testid to the root element if provided
GymTrialOffer Component > Rendering Logic > should render nothing if the trialOffer prop is undefined
GymTrialOffer Component > Rendering Logic > should render nothing if the trial is not available
GymTrialOffer Component > Content and Accessibility > should display the correct text and aria-label for multiple free classes
GymTrialOffer Component > Content and Accessibility > should handle singular text for one free class
GymTrialOffer Component > Content and Accessibility > should display combined text and aria-label for free days and notes
GymTrialOffer Component > Content and Accessibility > should display a fallback message and aria-label if trial has no details
